Amen Bank (AB)

Amen Bank stock price live, this page displays BVMT AB stock exchange data. View the AB premarket stock price ahead of the market session or assess the after hours quote. Monitor the latest movements within the Amen Bank real time stock price chart below.

What Is the Amen Bank Stock Price Today?
The Amen Bank stock price today is 60.20.

What Is the Stock Symbol for Amen Bank?
The stock ticker symbol for Amen Bank is AB.

Is AB the Same as $AB?
$AB is a common way to refer to the Amen Bank ticker symbol in social media, forums, and online discussions. The dollar sign is a shorthand convention used to indicate that it is a stock ticker symbol

What Stock Exchange Does Amen Bank Trade On?
Amen Bank is listed and trades on the Tunis stock exchange.

Is Amen Bank a Good Stock to Buy?
Determining whether Amen Bank—or any stock—is a good buy requires comprehensive analysis. To evaluate its potential, users can sign up to InvestingPro, where they can assess the current Amen Bank share price compared with the fair value and other essential metrics.

You can find more details by visiting the additional pages to view historical data, charts, latest news, analysis or visit the forum to view opinions on the AB quote. (ISIN: TN0003400058)

Amen Bank Company Profile

Amen Bank Société anonyme provides banking products and services to individuals and businesses in Tunisia. The company offers deposit products, including demand deposits, savings accounts, and term deposits; and investment products. The company was formerly known as Crédit Foncier et Commercial de Tunisie. Amen Bank Société anonyme was incorporated in 1967 and is headquartered in Tunis, Tunisia.

Industry
Banking Services

Financials

What Is the AMEN BANK (AB) Stock Price Today?

The AMEN BANK stock price today is 60.20 TND.

AMEN BANK is listed and trades on the Tunis Stock Exchange.

From a Technical Analysis Perspective, Is AB a Buy or Sell?

Based on moving averages and other technical indicators, the daily buy/sell signal is Strong Buy.

How Many Times Has AMEN BANK Stock Split?

AMEN BANK has split 11 times.

How Many Employees Does AMEN BANK Have?

AMEN BANK has 960 employees.

What is the current trading status of AMEN BANK (AB)?

As of Mar 30, 2026, AMEN BANK (AB) is trading at a price of 60.20 TND, with a previous close of 60.70 TND. The stock has fluctuated within a day range of 60.18 TND to 60.80 TND, while its 52-week range spans from 37.03 TND to 61.79 TND.

What Is AMEN BANK (AB) Price Target According to Analysts?

The average 12-month price target for AMEN BANK is 64.80 TND, with a high estimate of 64.8 TND and a low estimate of 64.8 TND. 0 analysts recommend buying the stock, while 1 suggest selling, leading to an overall rating of Sell. The stock has an +7.64% Upside potential.

Risk Disclosure: Trading in financial instruments and/or cryptocurrencies involves high risks including the risk of losing some, or all, of your investment amount, and may not be suitable for all investors. Prices of cryptocurrencies are extremely volatile and may be affected by external factors such as financial, regulatory or political events. Trading on margin increases the financial risks.
Before deciding to trade in financial instrument or cryptocurrencies you should be fully informed of the risks and costs associated with trading the financial markets, carefully consider your investment objectives, level of experience, and risk appetite, and seek professional advice where needed.
Fusion Media would like to remind you that the data contained in this website is not necessarily real-time nor accurate. The data and prices on the website are not necessarily provided by any market or exchange, but may be provided by market makers, and so prices may not be accurate and may differ from the actual price at any given market, meaning prices are indicative and not appropriate for trading purposes. Fusion Media and any provider of the data contained in this website will not accept liability for any loss or damage as a result of your trading, or your reliance on the information contained within this website.
